# Add an icon layer

Adds a point icon layer. Icons are referenced by id (resolved in the
frontend icon set).

## Usage

``` r
add_icons(
  map,
  data = NULL,
  lon = NULL,
  lat = NULL,
  icon = "marker",
  size = 18,
  color = "#3388ff",
  opacity = 1,
  tooltip = NULL,
  popup = NULL,
  id = NULL,
  group = NULL,
  pickable = TRUE,
  size_units = c("pixels", "meters", "common"),
  size_min_pixels = NULL,
  size_max_pixels = 64,
  icon_anchor = NULL,
  mask = TRUE,
  occlude = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

- map:

  A maplamina widget created by
  [`maplamina()`](https://jhumbl.github.io/maplamina/reference/maplamina.md).

- data:

  Data for this layer. If `NULL`, uses the default `data` supplied to
  [`maplamina()`](https://jhumbl.github.io/maplamina/reference/maplamina.md).

- lon, lat:

  Longitude/latitude aesthetics (formula or scalar). Required for
  non-`sf` data.

- icon:

  Icon id string (e.g. `"marker"`).

- size, color, opacity:

  Icon size and color/opacity (can be formulas).

- tooltip, popup:

  Optional
  [`tmpl()`](https://jhumbl.github.io/maplamina/reference/tmpl.md)
  objects (or `NULL`) for hover/click content.

- id, group:

  Optional layer id and group name.

- pickable:

  Logical; whether features can be picked (tooltip/popup).

- size_units:

  Units for `size`; one of `"pixels"`, `"meters"`, or `"common"`.

- size_min_pixels, size_max_pixels:

  Optional clamp in pixels when using meter/common units.

- icon_anchor:

  Optional anchor (frontend-specific).

- mask:

  Logical; whether to mask the icon.

- occlude:

  Logical; whether icons occlude each other.

## Value

The modified map widget.

## Examples

``` r
d <- data.frame(
  lon   = runif(1000, -60, 60),
  lat   = runif(1000, -60, 60),
  value = runif(1000, 1, 10)
)
maplamina() |>
  add_icons(d, icon = "star", size = 20)

{"x":{"map_options":{"style":"https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json","projection":"mercator","dragRotate":false,"fit_bounds":true,"controls":[{"type":"navigation","position":"topright","options":{"showZoom":true,"showCompass":false}}]},".__layers":{"icon1":{"id":"icon1","type":"icon","group":null,"data_columns":{"position":{"values":{"ref":"position"},"size":2}},"base_encodings":{"size":{"value":20},"fillColor":{"value":[51,136,255,255]}},"cfg":{"pickable":true,"stroke":false,"sizeUnits":"pixels","sizeMaxPixels":64,"icon":"star","mask":true,"occlude":false},"bbox":[-59.73386334255338,-59.94284816086292,59.979925788939,59.98472535051405],"coordinate_origin":null,"dataStore":{"blobs":{"blob_7c5f67386452de1c":{"dtype":"f32","href":{"data":"data:application/octet-stream;base64,"},"length":2000}},"refs":{"position":"blob_7c5f67386452de1c"}}}},".__components":{"views":[],"range":[],"select":[],"legends":[],"summaries":[]},".__controls":[],".__panel":null},"evals":[],"jsHooks":[]}
```
